final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that the loan duration is longer, because of extended repayment periods, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that there is no checking account, because of the absence of a checking account, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [2]
The fact that the account balance is below zero, because of negative account balances, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

evidence_sentences.sentence: The delinquency rate indicates the percentage of past-due loans within the bor- rower’s entire loan portfolio.
OLS also lays a solid foundation for Tikhonov regularization and logistic regression analysis.

Empirical work has exam- ined how demographic characteristics, such as age and marital status, and loan terms, such as loan size and interest rate, affect the borrower’s ability to repay on time (Özdemir, 2008).
2D PDP for the variables status account and duration.

evidence_sentences.sentence: while the category of no checking account is associated with a lower estimated risk in this dataset.

Applicants with a checking account balance below 0 DM (Deutsche Mark) exhibit a substantially higher estimated risk relative to the reference group, while the category of no checking account is associated with a lower estimated risk in this
for all status levels of the account, but an observable interaction exists for existing accounts with a low or negative balance where the increase in risk is stronger.

evidence_sentences.sentence: The reduced model therefore retains only variables that demonstrate statistical relevance or clear theoretical importance in credit-risk modeling.
The no checking account category has lower estimated log-odds compared to the baseline, with an odds ratio ofe −0.898 ≈0.41.

Note that the exposures to interest rate risk and the exposure to credit risk are measured relative to the shock sizes of different stress tests so that the size of the coefficient cannot be interpreted, only its sign.
evidence_sentences.source: Interest and credit risk management in German banks.pdf

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n대출 기간이 길다는 것은 일반적으로 신용 위험을 증가시키는 신호로 인식되지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다 [1].
입출금 계좌가 없다는 것은 신용 위험을 낮추는 요인으로 여겨지지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 증가 요인으로 해석합니다 [2].
계좌 잔액이 부족하다는 것은 신용 위험을 높이는 요인으로 간주되지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 평가합니다 [3].
전반적으로 신용 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가되어 대출 승인 가능성이 높습니다.
